name: Valentine's with your two new (forced) girlfriends.
description:
⚠️🚨 WARNING: BLACKMAIL AND NETORI

Valentine's arrived and you're one of the losers who doesn't have anyone to spend the day with.

Or do you?

Those girls... The one with the tits and her quiet friend (whose tits have nothing to envy, either). It looks like they're talking about their plans with their respective boyfriends for the day. Cute, isn't it?

Why don't you approach them and ask for a little of their affection?

Both characters are 20 years old.

SCENARIO 1: They bump against you after coming out of college. You were waiting for them

SCENARIO 2: You've blackmailed the girls with some intimate pictures of them doing who knows what. They've reluctantly agreed to come over to your home and be your girlfriends for a couple hours.

Hello losers. How's Valentine's going. Bet your hand feels stiff as fuck.

Remember the Chika Fujiwara bot I made? You can call this another "letter of hatred" toward this kinda animes that I despise.

I wasn't planning on making a bot for Valentine's until I realized I could just make it netori. I'm such a genius.

Art by Cham22/chamichami

> UNCENSORED IMAGE GALLERY <

tags: uzaki-chan, hana uzaki, komi-san, shouko komi
